news.title: Pine Cliff Energy Ltd. Declares Monthly Dividend for July 31, 2026
news.description: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - July 2, 2026) - Pine Cliff Energy Ltd. (TSX: PNE) (OTCQX: PIFYF) ("Pine Cliff" or the "Company") has declared a regular monthly dividend of $0.00125 per common share to be paid July 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on July 15, 2026.
